text:
Most loaders are forgettable. I built this as a design exploration at Mistral to see what happens when they’re not.

Today, I’m open sourcing it. Build something wild, tag me, and send over any feedback or bugs you find.

https://t.co/GXh6GNDWVt
embed_code:
